تسجيل الدخول

أدخل كلمة مرور المدير للمتابعة.
التجربة تستخدم مرة واحدة فقط لكل جهاز، ويتم حفظها في مسار تخزين مستقل عن بيانات الموقع الأساسية.
لا يستطيع الموظف تحويل نفسه إلى مدير. صلاحيات الموظفين تُدار فقط من حساب المدير.
oskar
كاشير أونلاين / أوفلاين
غير مسجل
oskar
جاري فحص الاتصال...

الأصناف السريعة

الكاشير

ابدأ بإضافة المنتجات للفاتورة

إجمالي الطلب

المجموع: ₪ 0.00
الخصم: ₪ 0.00
الإجمالي: ₪ 0.00

فاتورة مباشرة

الإجمالي: ₪ 0.00

المخزون والمنتجات

الكود المنتج التصنيف نوع الوحدة المخزون سعر الجملة للوحدة سعر البيع للوحدة باركود الإجراءات

الفواتير

رقم التاريخ العميل الهاتف الحالة الدفع مجلد الدفع المجموع الخصم المبلغ الإجراءات

حسابات الديون

مجموع عليه ₪ 0.00
مجموع له ₪ 0.00
عدد الحسابات 0
غير مكتمل 0
عليه ₪ 0.00
له ₪ 0.00
الصافي ₪ 0.00

المشتريات وإدخال البضاعة

التاريخ المورد الصنف الكمية نوع الإدخال التحويل المضاف للمخزون الجملة البيع الإجمالي حالة الدفع المدفوع المتبقي حساب الدفع ملاحظات الإجراءات

دفعات التجار

التاريخ اسم التاجر المبلغ من حساب ملاحظات الإجراءات

المصروفات

التاريخ نوع المصروف المبلغ حساب الدفع ملاحظات الإجراءات

تقارير تفصيلية

عدد الفواتير

كاش

تطبيق فوري

دين / لاحق

البضاعة الناقصة

الصنف الكود الكمية الأساسية الوحدة الأساسية سعر البيع الأساسي

أرصدة حسابات الدفع

الحساب الداخل الخارج الرصيد النهائي العمليات

الإعدادات

بيانات المحل

رابط الشعار يتزامن مع Firebase ويظهر على كل الأجهزة. أما شعار الجهاز فيبقى محليًا فقط ولا يتم رفعه.

أمان المدير

الموظفون والصلاحيات

المدير فقط يستطيع إضافة أو حذف الموظفين وتحديد الصلاحيات. إذا تم حذف الموظف أو تغيير صلاحياته سيتم إخراجه تلقائيًا عند المزامنة أو التحديث.

حسابات الدفع والتحويل

كل حساب دفع يظهر كمجلد داخل الفواتير. مثال: دفع كاش، تطبيق بنك، جوال بي، بال بي.

النسخ الاحتياطي

نافذة
قراءة باركود المنتج
`; document.body.appendChild(frame); const doc = frame.contentWindow.document; doc.open(); doc.write(docHtml); doc.close(); const doPrint = () => { try { frame.contentWindow.focus(); frame.contentWindow.print(); } finally { setTimeout(() => frame.remove(), 650); } }; const imgs = Array.from(doc.images || []); if (!imgs.length) { setTimeout(doPrint, 250); return; } let loaded = 0; const done = () => { loaded++; if (loaded >= imgs.length) setTimeout(doPrint, 250); }; imgs.forEach(img => { if (img.complete) done(); else { img.onload = done; img.onerror = done; } }); setTimeout(doPrint, 1800); } async function oskarFastWaitFrame() { return new Promise(resolve => requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(resolve))); } async function oskarFastCanvas(element) { if (!element) throw new Error("capture_element_not_found"); if (!window.html2canvas) throw new Error("html2canvas_not_ready"); const oldTransform = element.style.transform; const oldFilter = element.style.filter; element.style.transform = "none"; element.style.filter = "none"; try { if (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready) { await Promise.race([document.fonts.ready, new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 220))]); } } catch {} await oskarFastWaitFrame(); const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect(); const width = Math.max(320, Math.ceil(element.scrollWidth || rect.width || 900)); const height = Math.max(120, Math.ceil(element.scrollHeight || rect.height || 700)); const scale = window.innerWidth <= 640 ? 0.62 : 0.72; try { return await html2canvas(element, { scale, useCORS: true, allowTaint: true, backgroundColor: "#ffffff", logging: false, imageTimeout: 60, removeContainer: true, foreignObjectRendering: false, scrollX: 0, scrollY: 0, windowWidth: width, windowHeight: height, width, height }); } finally { element.style.transform = oldTransform; element.style.filter = oldFilter; } } function oskarSaveCanvas(canvas, filename, type = "image/png", quality = 0.9) { return new Promise((resolve) => { const fallback = () => { const a = document.createElement("a"); a.href = canvas.toDataURL(type === "image/jpeg" ? "image/jpeg" : "image/png", quality); a.download = filename; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove(); resolve(); }; if (!canvas.toBlob) return fallback(); try { canvas.toBlob((blob) => { if (!blob) return fallback(); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement("a"); a.href = url; a.download = filename; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove(); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1500); resolve(); }, type, quality); } catch { fallback(); } }); } async function downloadElementImage(element, filename) { const canvas = await oskarFastCanvas(element); const fastName = String(filename || `image-${todayKey()}.jpg`).replace(/\.png$/i, ".jpg"); await oskarSaveCanvas(canvas, fastName, "image/jpeg", 0.82); } async function downloadElementPdf(element, filename) { const canvas = await oskarFastCanvas(element); if (!window.jspdf || !window.jspdf.jsPDF) throw new Error("jspdf_not_ready"); const img = canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg", 0.74); const { jsPDF } = window.jspdf; const pdf = new jsPDF("p", "mm", "a4", true); const pageWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth(); const pageHeight = pdf.internal.pageSize.getHeight(); const margin = 5; const imgWidth = pageWidth - margin * 2; const imgHeight = canvas.height * imgWidth / canvas.width; if (imgHeight <= pageHeight - margin * 2) { pdf.addImage(img, "JPEG", margin, margin, imgWidth, imgHeight, undefined, "FAST"); } else { let position = 0; const usableHeight = pageHeight - margin * 2; while (position < imgHeight) { pdf.addImage(img, "JPEG", margin, margin - position, imgWidth, imgHeight, undefined, "FAST"); position += usableHeight; if (position < imgHeight) pdf.addPage(); } } pdf.save(filename); } function reportShell(title, bodyHtml) { const s = state.settings || defaultSettings; const visibleLogo = document.getElementById("topShopLogo")?.src || document.getElementById("sideShopLogo")?.src || ""; const logo = s.localLogo || s.logo || visibleLogo || makeLogoDataUrl(s.shopName || "oskar"); const logoFallback = makeLogoDataUrl(s.shopName || "oskar"); return `

${escapeHtml(s.shopName || "oskar")}

${escapeHtml(title)}
${formatDate(Date.now())}
${bodyHtml}
`; } function customerReportHtml(customer) { const rows = getCustomerTableRows(customer, "all"); return reportShell(`كشف حساب ${customer.name}`, `
الاسم: ${escapeHtml(customer.name)}
الهاتف: ${escapeHtml(customer.phone || "-")}
الرصيد: ${escapeHtml(customerBalanceText(customer.balance).text)}
تاريخ التقرير: ${formatDate(Date.now())}
${ rows.map(r => ` `).join("") || `` }
النوع التاريخ المدة البيان الحالة مدين دائن ملاحظات
${escapeHtml(r.النوع)} ${escapeHtml(r.التاريخ)} ${escapeHtml(r.المدة)} ${escapeHtml(r.البيان)} ${escapeHtml(r.الحالة)} ${money(r.مدين)} ${money(r.دائن)} ${escapeHtml(r.ملاحظات)}
لا توجد بيانات
`); } function printCustomer(customerId) { const customer = state.customers.find(c => c.id === customerId); if (!customer) return; printHtml(customerReportHtml(customer)); } function imageCustomer(customerId) { const customer = state.customers.find(c => c.id === customerId); if (!customer) return; const wrap = document.createElement("div"); wrap.style.position = "fixed"; wrap.style.right = "-9999px"; wrap.style.top = "0"; wrap.style.width = "1200px"; wrap.innerHTML = customerReportHtml(customer); document.body.appendChild(wrap); downloadElementImage(wrap, `customer-${customer.name}-${todayKey()}.png`).finally(() => wrap.remove()); } function pdfCustomer(customerId) { const customer = state.customers.find(c => c.id === customerId); if (!customer) return; const wrap = document.createElement("div"); wrap.style.position = "fixed"; wrap.style.right = "-9999px"; wrap.style.top = "0"; wrap.style.width = "1200px"; wrap.innerHTML = customerReportHtml(customer); document.body.appendChild(wrap); downloadElementPdf(wrap, `customer-${customer.name}-${todayKey()}.pdf`).finally(() => wrap.remove()); } function excelCustomer(customerId) { const customer = state.customers.find(c => c.id === customerId); if (!customer) return; const rows = getCustomerTableRows(customer, "all").map(r => ({ النوع: r.النوع, التاريخ: r.التاريخ, المدة: r.المدة, البيان: r.البيان, الحالة: r.الحالة, مدين: r.مدين, دائن: r.دائن, ملاحظات: r.ملاحظات })); exportExcel(`كشف-${customer.name}-${todayKey()}.xlsx`, "كشف الحساب", rows); } function exportExcel(filename, sheetName, rows) { if (!window.XLSX) { toast("مكتبة Excel لم تعمل. تأكد من الاتصال بالإنترنت أول مرة"); return; } const safeRows = Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : []; if (!safeRows.length) { toast("لا توجد بيانات لتصدير Excel"); return; } const ws = XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(safeRows); const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new(); XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, String(sheetName || "Sheet1").slice(0, 31)); XLSX.writeFile(wb, filename); } function excelSingleInvoice(invoiceId) { const inv = state.invoices.find(i => i.id === invoiceId); if (!inv) return; const rows = (inv.items || []).map(item => ({ رقم_الفاتورة: inv.number, التاريخ: formatDate(inv.createdAt), العميل: inv.customerName || "زبون نقدي", الهاتف: inv.customerPhone || "", الدفع: paymentMethodLabel(inv.paymentMethod), المجلد: paymentFolderName(inv), الموظف: inv.employeeName || "", الصنف: item.name || "", الكمية: item.qtyText || item.qty || "", الوحدة: item.unitLabel || "", السعر: cleanNumber(item.price), الإجمالي: cleanNumber(item.total) })); rows.push({ رقم_الفاتورة: inv.number, التاريخ: "", العميل: "", الهاتف: "", الدفع: "", المجلد: "", الموظف: "", الصنف: "الإجمالي", الكمية: "", الوحدة: "", السعر: "", الإجمالي: cleanNumber(inv.total) }); exportExcel(`invoice-${inv.number}.xlsx`, "فاتورة", rows); } function excelInventory() { const rows = state.products.map(p => { p = normalizeProduct(p); return { الكود: p.barcode || p.code || "", المنتج: p.name || "", التصنيف: p.category || "", نوع_الوحدة: unitLabel(p.unitType, p.customUnit), الوحدة_الأساسية: unitLabel(p.baseUnit, p.customUnit), المخزون_الأساسي: cleanNumber(p.stock), سعر_الجملة_الأساسي: cleanNumber(p.costPrice), سعر_البيع_الأساسي: cleanNumber(p.salePrice), حد_التنبيه: cleanNumber(p.lowStock) }; }); exportExcel(`inventory-${todayKey()}.xlsx`, "المخزون", rows); } function excelDebts() { rebuildCustomerBalances(false); const rows = state.customers.map(c => ({ الاسم: c.name || "", الهاتف: c.phone || "", الرصيد: cleanNumber(c.balance), عليه: Math.max(0, cleanNumber(c.balance)), له: Math.max(0, -cleanNumber(c.balance)), إجمالي_المبيعات: cleanNumber(c.totalSales), إجمالي_الدفعات: cleanNumber(c.totalPaid), عدد_الفواتير: cleanNumber(c.invoicesCount), آخر_حركة: formatDate(getCustomerLastActivity(c.id)) })); exportExcel(`debts-${todayKey()}.xlsx`, "الديون", rows); } function excelPurchases() { const rows = state.purchases.map(p => ({ التاريخ: formatDate(p.createdAt), المورد: p.supplier || "", الصنف: p.productName || "", الكمية: cleanNumber(p.qty), وحدة_الإدخال: p.inputUnitLabel || "", التحويل: p.conversionText || "", المضاف_للمخزون: cleanNumber(p.qtyBase), الجملة: cleanNumber(p.cost), البيع: cleanNumber(p.salePrice), الإجمالي: cleanNumber(p.total), ملاحظات: p.notes || "" })); exportExcel(`purchases-${todayKey()}.xlsx`, "المشتريات", rows); } function excelSupplierPayments() { const rows = state.supplierPayments.map(p => { const acc = state.paymentAccounts.find(a => a.id === p.accountId); return { التاريخ: formatDate(p.createdAt), التاجر: p.supplierName || "", المبلغ: cleanNumber(p.amount), الحساب: acc?.name || "", ملاحظات: p.notes || "" }; }); exportExcel(`supplier-payments-${todayKey()}.xlsx`, "دفعات التجار", rows); } function excelExpenses() { const rows = state.expenses.map(e => ({ التاريخ: formatDate(e.createdAt), النوع: e.type || "", المبلغ: cleanNumber(e.amount), ملاحظات: e.notes || "" })); exportExcel(`expenses-${todayKey()}.xlsx`, "المصروفات", rows); } function excelLowStock() { const rows = state.products .filter(p => cleanNumber(p.stock) <= cleanNumber(p.lowStock || state.settings?.lowStock || 5)) .map(p => { p = normalizeProduct(p); return { الصنف: p.name || "", الكود: p.barcode || p.code || "", الكمية_الأساسية: cleanNumber(p.stock), الوحدة_الأساسية: unitLabel(p.baseUnit, p.customUnit), سعر_البيع_الأساسي: cleanNumber(p.salePrice), حد_التنبيه: cleanNumber(p.lowStock) }; }); exportExcel(`low-stock-${todayKey()}.xlsx`, "البضاعة الناقصة", rows); } function excelInvoices() { const invoices = getFilteredInvoices(); const rows = []; invoices.forEach(inv => { const base = { رقم_الفاتورة: inv.number, التاريخ: formatDate(inv.createdAt), العميل: inv.customerName || "زبون نقدي", الهاتف: inv.customerPhone || "", الحالة: inv.status === "paid" ? "مكتملة" : "غير مكتملة", الدفع: paymentMethodLabel(inv.paymentMethod), المجلد: paymentFolderName(inv), الموظف: inv.employeeName || "", المجموع: cleanNumber(inv.subtotal), الخصم: cleanNumber(inv.discount), المبلغ: cleanNumber(inv.total), الربح: cleanNumber(inv.profit) }; if (!inv.items || !inv.items.length) { rows.push({ ...base, الصنف: "", الكمية: "", الوحدة: "", سعر_الصنف: "", إجمالي_الصنف: "" }); } else { inv.items.forEach(item => { rows.push({ ...base, الصنف: item.name || "", الكمية: item.qtyText || item.qty || "", الوحدة: item.unitLabel || "", سعر_الصنف: cleanNumber(item.price), إجمالي_الصنف: cleanNumber(item.total) }); }); } }); exportExcel(`invoices-${todayKey()}.xlsx`, "الفواتير", rows); } function excelReports() { const data = getFilteredReportData(); const rows = []; data.invoices.forEach(inv => { rows.push({ القسم: "فاتورة", التاريخ: formatDate(inv.createdAt), البيان: `فاتورة #${inv.number}`, الاسم: inv.customerName || "زبون نقدي", الدفع: paymentMethodLabel(inv.paymentMethod), الحساب: paymentFolderName(inv), مدخل: cleanNumber(inv.total), خارج: 0, ربح: cleanNumber(inv.profit), ملاحظات: inv.employeeName ? `الموظف: ${inv.employeeName}` : "" }); }); data.expenses.forEach(e => { rows.push({ القسم: "مصروف", التاريخ: formatDate(e.createdAt), البيان: e.type || "", الاسم: "", الدفع: "", الحساب: "", مدخل: 0, خارج: cleanNumber(e.amount), ربح: -cleanNumber(e.amount), ملاحظات: e.notes || "" }); }); data.purchases.forEach(p => { rows.push({ القسم: "مشتريات", التاريخ: formatDate(p.createdAt), البيان: p.productName || "", الاسم: p.supplier || "", الدفع: "", الحساب: "", مدخل: 0, خارج: cleanNumber(p.total), ربح: 0, ملاحظات: p.notes || "" }); }); data.supplierPayments.forEach(p => { const acc = state.paymentAccounts.find(a => a.id === p.accountId); rows.push({ القسم: "دفعة تاجر", التاريخ: formatDate(p.createdAt), البيان: p.supplierName || "", الاسم: p.supplierName || "", الدفع: "", الحساب: acc?.name || "", مدخل: 0, خارج: cleanNumber(p.amount), ربح: 0, ملاحظات: p.notes || "" }); }); exportExcel(`reports-${todayKey()}.xlsx`, "تقرير شامل", rows); } function buildFullInvoicesReportHtml() { const invoices = getFilteredInvoices(); const rows = []; invoices.forEach(inv => { const acc = state.paymentAccounts.find(a => a.id === inv.paymentAccountId); if (!inv.items || !inv.items.length) { rows.push(` #${inv.number} ${formatDate(inv.createdAt)} ${escapeHtml(inv.customerName || "زبون نقدي")} ${escapeHtml(inv.customerPhone || "-")} ${escapeHtml(paymentMethodLabel(inv.paymentMethod))} ${escapeHtml(acc?.name || paymentFolderName(inv))} ${escapeHtml(inv.employeeName || "-")} - - ${money(0)} ${money(inv.total)} `); } else { inv.items.forEach(item => { rows.push(` #${inv.number} ${formatDate(inv.createdAt)} ${escapeHtml(inv.customerName || "زبون نقدي")} ${escapeHtml(inv.customerPhone || "-")} ${escapeHtml(paymentMethodLabel(inv.paymentMethod))} ${escapeHtml(acc?.name || paymentFolderName(inv))} ${escapeHtml(inv.employeeName || "-")} ${escapeHtml(item.name || "-")} ${escapeHtml(item.qtyText || item.qty || "1")} ${money(item.price)} ${money(item.total)} `); }); } }); return reportShell("تقرير الفواتير الكامل", ` ${rows.join("") || ``}
رقم التاريخ العميل الهاتف الدفع المجلد الموظف الصنف الكمية السعر الإجمالي
لا توجد بيانات
`); } function buildFullReportsHtml() { const data = getFilteredReportData(); const invoices = data.invoices; const expenses = data.expenses; const purchases = data.purchases; const supplierPayments = data.supplierPayments; const salesTotal = invoices.reduce((s, x) => s + cleanNumber(x.total), 0); const profitTotal = invoices.reduce((s, x) => s + cleanNumber(x.profit), 0); const expensesTotal = expenses.reduce((s, x) => s + cleanNumber(x.amount), 0); const supplierPaymentsTotal = supplierPayments.reduce((s, x) => s + cleanNumber(x.amount), 0); const purchasesTotal = purchases.reduce((s, x) => s + cleanNumber(x.total), 0); const invoiceRows = invoices.map(inv => ` #${inv.number} ${formatDate(inv.createdAt)} ${escapeHtml(inv.customerName || "زبون نقدي")} ${escapeHtml(paymentMethodLabel(inv.paymentMethod))} ${escapeHtml(paymentFolderName(inv))} ${escapeHtml(inv.employeeName || "-")} ${money(inv.total)} ${money(inv.profit)} `).join(""); const expenseRows = expenses.map(e => ` ${formatDate(e.createdAt)} ${escapeHtml(e.type)} ${money(e.amount)} ${escapeHtml(e.notes || "-")} `).join(""); const purchaseRows = purchases.map(p => ` ${formatDate(p.createdAt)} ${escapeHtml(p.supplier)} ${escapeHtml(p.productName)} ${cleanNumber(p.qty)} ${escapeHtml(p.inputUnitLabel || "-")} ${cleanNumber(p.qtyBase)} ${money(p.total)} `).join(""); const supplierPaymentRows = supplierPayments.map(p => { const acc = state.paymentAccounts.find(a => a.id === p.accountId); return ` ${formatDate(p.createdAt)} ${escapeHtml(p.supplierName || "-")} ${money(p.amount)} ${escapeHtml(acc?.name || "-")} ${escapeHtml(p.notes || "-")} `; }).join(""); return reportShell("تقرير مالي شامل", `
المبيعات: ${money(salesTotal)}
الأرباح: ${money(profitTotal)}
المصاريف: ${money(expensesTotal)}
دفعات التجار: ${money(supplierPaymentsTotal)}
المشتريات: ${money(purchasesTotal)}
الصافي: ${money(profitTotal - expensesTotal)}

الفواتير

${invoiceRows || ``}
رقم التاريخ العميل الدفع المجلد الموظف المبلغ الربح
لا توجد فواتير

المصروفات

${expenseRows || ``}
التاريخ النوع المبلغ ملاحظات
لا توجد مصروفات

المشتريات

${purchaseRows || ``}
التاريخ المورد الصنف الكمية الوحدة المضاف للمخزون الإجمالي
لا توجد مشتريات

دفعات التجار

${supplierPaymentRows || ``}
التاريخ التاجر المبلغ الحساب ملاحظات
لا توجد دفعات تجار
`); } function printCurrentInvoices() { printHtml(buildFullInvoicesReportHtml()); } function imageCurrentInvoices() { const wrap = document.createElement("div"); wrap.style.position = "fixed"; wrap.style.right = "-9999px"; wrap.style.top = "0"; wrap.style.width = "1200px"; wrap.innerHTML = buildFullInvoicesReportHtml(); document.body.appendChild(wrap); downloadElementImage(wrap, `invoices-full-${todayKey()}.png`).finally(() => wrap.remove()); } function pdfCurrentInvoices() { const wrap = document.createElement("div"); wrap.style.position = "fixed"; wrap.style.right = "-9999px"; wrap.style.top = "0"; wrap.style.width = "1200px"; wrap.innerHTML = buildFullInvoicesReportHtml(); document.body.appendChild(wrap); downloadElementPdf(wrap, `invoices-full-${todayKey()}.pdf`).finally(() => wrap.remove()); } function printCurrentReports() { printHtml(buildFullReportsHtml()); } function imageCurrentReports() { const wrap = document.createElement("div"); wrap.style.position = "fixed"; wrap.style.right = "-9999px"; wrap.style.top = "0"; wrap.style.width = "1200px"; wrap.innerHTML = buildFullReportsHtml(); document.body.appendChild(wrap); downloadElementImage(wrap, `reports-full-${todayKey()}.png`).finally(() => wrap.remove()); } function pdfCurrentReports() { const wrap = document.createElement("div"); wrap.style.position = "fixed"; wrap.style.right = "-9999px"; wrap.style.top = "0"; wrap.style.width = "1200px"; wrap.innerHTML = buildFullReportsHtml(); document.body.appendChild(wrap); downloadElementPdf(wrap, `reports-full-${todayKey()}.pdf`).finally(() => wrap.remove()); } async function saveSettings() { const logoUrl = $("settingLogoUrl")?.value.trim() || ""; const file = $("settingLogoFile")?.files?.[0] || null; let localLogo = state.settings?.localLogo || ""; if (file) { localLogo = await readFileAsDataUrl(file); } state.settings = { ...defaultSettings, ...state.settings, id: "main", shopName: $("settingShopName").value.trim() || "oskar", shopPhone: $("settingShopPhone").value.trim(), currency: $("settingCurrency").value.trim() || "₪", lowStock: cleanNumber($("settingLowStock").value, 5), logo: logoUrl, localLogo, logoMode: localLogo ? "local" : (logoUrl ? "url" : "default"), adminPasswordHash: state.settings?.adminPasswordHash || simpleHash(DEFAULT_ADMIN_PIN), updatedAt: Date.now() }; await idbPut("settings", state.settings); await enqueueSync({ type: "set", store: "settings", itemId: "main", data: stripLocalOnlySettings(state.settings) }); applySettingsToUI(); renderAll(); toast("تم حفظ الإعدادات، الشعار المحلي لا يرفع ورابط الشعار يتزامن"); } function exportBackup() { if (OSKAR_TRIAL_ACTIVE) { toast("لا يتوفر هذا القسم في النسخة التجريبية"); return; } const data = { version: DB_VERSION, dbName: DB_NAME, firebaseNamespace: DB_NAMESPACE, firebaseRoot: FIREBASE_ROOT, exportedAt: Date.now(), products: state.products, invoices: state.invoices, customers: state.customers, expenses: state.expenses, purchases: state.purchases, supplierPayments: state.supplierPayments, paymentAccounts: state.paymentAccounts, employees: state.employees, suppliers: state.suppliers || [], workers: state.workers || [], workerWages: state.workerWages || [], accountMovements: state.accountMovements || [], settings: state.settings }; const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], { type: "application/json" }); const a = document.createElement("a"); a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download = `cashier-backup-${DB_NAMESPACE}-${todayKey()}.json`; a.click(); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href), 1000); } async function importBackup(file) { if (OSKAR_TRIAL_ACTIVE) { toast("لا يتوفر هذا القسم في النسخة التجريبية"); if ($("importBackupInput")) $("importBackupInput").value = ""; return; } if (!file) return; try { const text = await file.text(); const data = JSON.parse(text); if (Array.isArray(data.products)) await idbBulkPut("products", data.products.map(normalizeProduct)); if (Array.isArray(data.invoices)) await idbBulkPut("invoices", data.invoices); if (Array.isArray(data.customers)) await idbBulkPut("customers", data.customers.map(normalizeCustomer)); if (Array.isArray(data.expenses)) await idbBulkPut("expenses", data.expenses); if (Array.isArray(data.purchases)) await idbBulkPut("purchases", data.purchases); if (Array.isArray(data.supplierPayments)) await idbBulkPut("supplierPayments", data.supplierPayments); if (Array.isArray(data.paymentAccounts)) await idbBulkPut("paymentAccounts", data.paymentAccounts.map(normalizePaymentAccount)); if (Array.isArray(data.employees)) await idbBulkPut("employees", data.employees.map(normalizeEmployee)); if (data.settings) { await idbPut("settings", { ...defaultSettings, ...data.settings, id: "main", adminPasswordHash: data.settings.adminPasswordHash || simpleHash(DEFAULT_ADMIN_PIN) }); } await loadLocalData(true); for (const store of ["products", "invoices", "customers", "expenses", "purchases", "supplierPayments", "paymentAccounts", "employees"]) { for (const item of state[store]) { await enqueueSync({ type: "set", store, itemId: item.id, data: item }); } } await enqueueSync({ type: "set", store: "settings", itemId: "main", data: stripLocalOnlySettings(state.settings) }); renderAll(); toast("تم استيراد النسخة الاحتياطية لهذا المشروع"); } catch (e) { console.error(e); toast("فشل استيراد النسخة"); } } async function clearLocalData() { if (!confirm("هل أنت متأكد من مسح بيانات هذا المشروع فقط؟")) return; for (const store of STORE_NAMES) { await idbClear(store); } clearAuthSession(); state.products = []; state.invoices = []; state.customers = []; state.expenses = []; state.purchases = []; state.supplierPayments = []; state.paymentAccounts = defaultAccounts.map(normalizePaymentAccount); state.employees = []; state.cart = []; state.freeLines = [{ id: uid("free"), name: "", qty: 1, cost: 0, price: 0 }]; state.settings = { ...defaultSettings, adminPasswordHash: simpleHash(DEFAULT_ADMIN_PIN) }; state.auth.user = null; await idbPut("settings", state.settings); await idbBulkPut("paymentAccounts", state.paymentAccounts); renderAll(); await refreshPendingCount(); $("authLock")?.classList.remove("hide"); toast("تم مسح بيانات هذا المشروع محليًا"); } async function deleteProduct(productId) { const hasInvoices = state.invoices.some(inv => (inv.items || []).some(item => item.productId === productId) ); if (hasInvoices) { if (!confirm("هذا المنتج مستخدم في فواتير. سيتم حذف المنتج فقط وتبقى الفواتير كما هي. متابعة؟")) return; } else { if (!confirm("حذف المنتج؟")) return; } state.products = state.products.filter(p => p.id !== productId); await removeLocal("products", productId, true); renderAll(); toast("تم حذف المنتج"); } async function deletePurchase(purchaseId) { const purchase = state.purchases.find(p => p.id === purchaseId); if (!purchase) return; if (!confirm("حذف سجل المشتريات؟ سيتم خصم الكمية التي أضافها من المخزون.")) return; const product = getProductById(purchase.productId); if (product) { product.stock = cleanNumber(product.stock) - cleanNumber(purchase.qtyBase); product.updatedAt = Date.now(); await saveLocal("products", normalizeProduct(product), true); state.products = state.products.map(p => p.id === product.id ? normalizeProduct(product) : p ); } state.purchases = state.purchases.filter(p => p.id !== purchaseId); await removeLocal("purchases", purchaseId, true); renderAll(); toast("تم حذف المشتريات وإعادة حساب المخزون"); } async function deleteSupplierPayment(paymentId) { if (!confirm("حذف دفعة التاجر؟")) return; state.supplierPayments = state.supplierPayments.filter(p => p.id !== paymentId); await removeLocal("supplierPayments", paymentId, true); renderAll(); toast("تم حذف دفعة التاجر"); } async function deleteExpense(expenseId) { if (!confirm("حذف المصروف؟")) return; state.expenses = state.expenses.filter(e => e.id !== expenseId); await removeLocal("expenses", expenseId, true); renderAll(); toast("تم حذف المصروف"); } async function deletePaymentAccount(accountId) { if (accountId === "cash") { toast("لا يمكن حذف حساب الكاش الأساسي"); return; } const used = state.invoices.some(inv => inv.paymentAccountId === accountId); if (used) { if (!confirm("هذا الحساب مستخدم في فواتير. سيتم حذف الحساب وتبقى الفواتير مرتبطة باسمه القديم فقط. متابعة؟")) return; } else { if (!confirm("حذف حساب الدفع؟")) return; } state.paymentAccounts = state.paymentAccounts.filter(a => a.id !== accountId); await removeLocal("paymentAccounts", accountId, true); renderAll(); toast("تم حذف حساب الدفع"); } function openNotifications() { const backupLast = Number(localStorage.getItem("oskar_last_full_backup_at") || 0); const backupDue = !backupLast || (Date.now() - backupLast) >= (12 * 60 * 60 * 1000); const backupText = backupLast ? `آخر نسخة احتياطية: ${formatDate(backupLast)}` : "لم يتم أخذ نسخة احتياطية بعد"; const laterUnpaid = state.invoices.filter(i => i.paymentMethod === "later_app" && i.status !== "paid" ); const manualUnpaid = state.customers.flatMap(c => (c.manualDebts || []).filter(d => d.status !== "paid").map(d => ({ ...d, customerName: c.name, customerId: c.id })) ); openModal("التنبيهات", `

النسخة الاحتياطية

${backupDue ? 'خذ نسخة احتياطية الآن' : 'النسخ الاحتياطي محدث'}
${escapeHtml(backupText)} · يفضل أخذ نسخة كل 12 ساعة
${backupDue ? 'مطلوب' : 'تمام'}

تطبيق لاحق غير مكتمل

${ laterUnpaid.map(inv => `
فاتورة #${inv.number}
${escapeHtml(inv.customerName || "-")} · ${formatAge(inv.createdAt)}
${money(inv.total)}
`).join("") || `
لا توجد فواتير تطبيق لاحق غير مكتملة
` }

ديون يدوية غير مكتملة

${ manualUnpaid.map(d => `
${escapeHtml(d.customerName)}
${escapeHtml(d.note || "دين يدوي")} · ${formatAge(d.createdAt)}
${money(d.amount)}
`).join("") || `
لا توجد ديون يدوية غير مكتملة
` }
`, true); } function stopScanner() { if (state.scanner.reader) { try { state.scanner.reader.reset(); } catch {} } state.scanner.reader = null; state.scanner.active = false; state.scanner.locked = false; } function stopFloatingScanner() { if (state.scanner.floatingReader) { try { state.scanner.floatingReader.reset(); } catch {} } state.scanner.floatingReader = null; if ($("floatingScanner")) { $("floatingScanner").classList.remove("show"); } state.scanner.locked = false; } async function openFloatingProductBarcodeScanner(targetInputId = "productBarcode") { state.scanner.targetInputId = targetInputId; state.scanner.locked = false; $("floatingScanner").classList.add("show"); $("floatingScannerCloseBtn").onclick = stopFloatingScanner; $("floatingManualCodeBtn").onclick = () => { const code = prompt("أدخل الباركود يدويًا"); if (!code) return; const input = $(targetInputId); if (input) { input.value = code.trim(); input.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true })); } stopFloatingScanner(); toast("تم إدخال الباركود"); }; try { state.scanner.floatingReader = new ZXing.BrowserMultiFormatReader(); await state.scanner.floatingReader.decodeFromVideoDevice( null, "floatingScannerVideo", (result) => { if (!result || state.scanner.locked) return; state.scanner.locked = true; const code = String(result.text || "").trim(); const input = $(targetInputId); if (input) { input.value = code; input.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true })); } stopFloatingScanner(); toast("تمت قراءة الباركود ووضعه في خانة كود المنتج"); } ); } catch (e) { console.error(e); toast("تعذر فتح الكاميرا، تأكد من الصلاحيات و HTTPS"); } } async function openScanner(mode = "sale", targetInputId = "") { state.scanner.mode = mode; state.scanner.targetInputId = targetInputId || ""; state.scanner.locked = false; const node = cloneTemplate("scannerTemplate"); openModal("قراءة باركود بالكاميرا", node); $("stopScannerBtn").onclick = closeModal; $("manualCodeFromScannerBtn").onclick = () => { const code = prompt("أدخل الكود يدوياً"); if (code) handleScannedCode(code); }; try { state.scanner.reader = new ZXing.BrowserMultiFormatReader(); state.scanner.active = true; await state.scanner.reader.decodeFromVideoDevice( null, "scannerVideo", (result) => { if (!result || state.scanner.locked) return; state.scanner.locked = true; handleScannedCode(result.text); } ); } catch (e) { console.error(e); toast("تعذر فتح الكاميرا، تأكد من الصلاحيات و HTTPS"); } } function handleScannedCode(code) { stopScanner(); const product = getProductByBarcode(code); if (product) { closeModal(); addToCart(product); } else { closeModal(); toast("لم يتم العثور على منتج بهذا الباركود"); } } function openManualBarcode() { const code = prompt("أدخل الباركود أو كود المنتج"); if (!code) return; const product = getProductByBarcode(code); if (product) { addToCart(product); } else { toast("لم يتم العثور على منتج بهذا الكود"); } } function openQuickAddMenu() { openModal("إضافة سريعة", `
`); } function handleQuickAction(action) { closeModal(); setTimeout(() => { if (action === "product") { switchPage("inventory"); openProductForm(); } if (action === "purchase") { switchPage("purchases"); openPurchaseForm(); } if (action === "supplierPayment") { switchPage("supplierPayments"); openSupplierPaymentForm(); } if (action === "customer") { switchPage("debts"); openDebtCustomerForm(); } if (action === "expense") { switchPage("expenses"); openExpenseForm(); } }, 120); } function closeSidebarIfOutside(e) { const sidebar = $("sidebar"); const menuBtn = $("openMenuBtn"); if (!sidebar || !sidebar.classList.contains("open")) return; if (sidebar.contains(e.target)) return; if (menuBtn && menuBtn.contains(e.target)) return; sidebar.classList.remove("open"); } function ensureAuthLockHtml() { if ($("authLock")) return; const lock = document.createElement("div"); lock.id = "authLock"; lock.className = "auth-lock"; lock.innerHTML = `

تسجيل الدخول

أدخل كلمة مرور المدير للمتابعة.

`; document.body.appendChild(lock); } function ensureAuthTopButtons() { const bar = document.querySelector(".topbar > div:last-child"); if (!bar || $("logoutBtn")) return; const pill = document.createElement("div"); pill.id = "authUserPill"; pill.className = "auth-user-pill"; pill.innerHTML = ` غير مسجل`; const btn = document.createElement("button"); btn.id = "logoutBtn"; btn.className = "icon-btn"; btn.title = "تسجيل الخروج"; btn.innerHTML = ``; bar.prepend(btn); bar.prepend(pill); btn.onclick = logout; } function ensureSettingsAuthBoxes() { const settingsPage = $("page-settings"); if (!settingsPage || $("adminSecurityBox")) return; const html = `

أمان المدير

المدير والموظفين

الموظف يدخل مرة واحدة فقط ويتم حفظ الجلسة. إذا غيّر المدير صلاحياته أو حذف حسابه، يخرج الموظف تلقائياً عند المزامنة.
`; const firstCard = settingsPage.querySelector(".card"); firstCard.insertAdjacentHTML("beforebegin", html); $("changeAdminPasswordBtn").onclick = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); await changeAdminPassword(); }; $("addEmployeeBtn").onclick = () => openEmployeeForm(); } function bindEvents() { ensureAuthLockHtml(); ensureAuthTopButtons(); ensureSettingsAuthBoxes(); bindAuthLoginEvents(); document.addEventListener("click", async (e) => { closeSidebarIfOutside(e); const nav = e.target.closest("[data-page]"); if (nav) { switchPage(nav.dataset.page); return; } const jump = e.target.closest("[data-page-jump]"); if (jump) { switchPage(jump.dataset.pageJump); return; } const addProduct = e.target.closest("[data-add-product]"); if (addProduct) { addToCart(getProductById(addProduct.dataset.addProduct)); return; } const suggest = e.target.closest("[data-suggest-product]"); if (suggest) { addToCart(getProductById(suggest.dataset.suggestProduct)); $("cashierSearch").value = ""; $("suggestionsBox").style.display = "none"; return; } const invoiceFolder = e.target.closest("[data-invoice-folder]"); if (invoiceFolder) { state.activeInvoiceFolder = invoiceFolder.dataset.invoiceFolder || "all"; renderInvoiceFolders(); renderInvoices(); return; } const inc = e.target.closest("[data-inc-cart]"); if (inc) { const line = state.cart.find(x => x.id === inc.dataset.incCart); if (line) { line.qty = cleanNumber(line.qty, 1) + 1; updateCartLine(line.id, { qty: line.qty }); } return; } const dec = e.target.closest("[data-dec-cart]"); if (dec) { const line = state.cart.find(x => x.id === dec.dataset.decCart); if (line) { line.qty = Math.max(0, cleanNumber(line.qty, 1) - 1); updateCartLine(line.id, { qty: line.qty }); } return; } const removeCart = e.target.closest("[data-remove-cart]"); if (removeCart) { state.cart = state.cart.filter(x => x.id !== removeCart.dataset.removeCart); renderCart(); return; } const removeFree = e.target.closest("[data-remove-free]"); if (removeFree) { state.freeLines = state.freeLines.filter(x => x.id !== removeFree.dataset.removeFree); renderFreeInvoice(); return; } const editProduct = e.target.closest("[data-edit-product]"); if (editProduct) { openProductForm(editProduct.dataset.editProduct); return; } const deleteProductBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-product]"); if (deleteProductBtn) { await deleteProduct(deleteProductBtn.dataset.deleteProduct); return; } const showBarcodeBtn = e.target.closest("[data-show-barcode]"); if (showBarcodeBtn) { showBarcode(showBarcodeBtn.dataset.showBarcode); return; } const viewInvoice = e.target.closest("[data-view-invoice]"); if (viewInvoice) { const inv = state.invoices.find(i => i.id === viewInvoice.dataset.viewInvoice); if (inv) openInvoiceView(inv); return; } const editInvoiceBtn = e.target.closest("[data-edit-invoice]"); if (editInvoiceBtn) { openEditInvoiceForm(editInvoiceBtn.dataset.editInvoice); return; } const deleteInvoiceBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-invoice]"); if (deleteInvoiceBtn) { await deleteInvoice(deleteInvoiceBtn.dataset.deleteInvoice); return; } const openCustomer = e.target.closest("[data-open-customer]"); if (openCustomer) { openCustomerAccount(openCustomer.dataset.openCustomer); return; } const deleteCustomerBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-customer]"); if (deleteCustomerBtn) { await deleteCustomer(deleteCustomerBtn.dataset.deleteCustomer); return; } const payCustomerBtn = e.target.closest("[data-pay-customer]"); if (payCustomerBtn) { payCustomer(payCustomerBtn.dataset.payCustomer); return; } const addManualDebtBtn = e.target.closest("[data-add-manual-debt]"); if (addManualDebtBtn) { addManualDebt(addManualDebtBtn.dataset.addManualDebt); return; } const viewManualDebt = e.target.closest("[data-view-manual-debt]"); if (viewManualDebt) { const [customerId, debtId] = viewManualDebt.dataset.viewManualDebt.split("|"); openManualDebtViewOnly(customerId, debtId); return; } const editManualDebtBtn = e.target.closest("[data-edit-manual-debt]"); if (editManualDebtBtn) { const [customerId, debtId] = editManualDebtBtn.dataset.editManualDebt.split("|"); openEditManualDebtForm(customerId, debtId); return; } const deleteManualDebtBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-manual-debt]"); if (deleteManualDebtBtn) { const [customerId, debtId] = deleteManualDebtBtn.dataset.deleteManualDebt.split("|"); await deleteManualDebt(customerId, debtId); return; } const editCustomerPaymentBtn = e.target.closest("[data-edit-customer-payment]"); if (editCustomerPaymentBtn) { const [customerId, paymentId] = editCustomerPaymentBtn.dataset.editCustomerPayment.split("|"); openEditCustomerPaymentForm(customerId, paymentId); return; } const deleteCustomerPaymentBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-customer-payment]"); if (deleteCustomerPaymentBtn) { const [customerId, paymentId] = deleteCustomerPaymentBtn.dataset.deleteCustomerPayment.split("|"); await deleteCustomerPayment(customerId, paymentId); return; } const editDebtCustomer = e.target.closest("[data-edit-debt-customer]"); if (editDebtCustomer) { openDebtCustomerForm(editDebtCustomer.dataset.editDebtCustomer); return; } const markManualPaid = e.target.closest("[data-mark-manual-debt-paid]"); if (markManualPaid) { const [customerId, debtId] = markManualPaid.dataset.markManualDebtPaid.split("|"); await markManualDebtPaid(customerId, debtId); return; } const laterStatus = e.target.closest("[data-open-later-status]"); if (laterStatus) { openLaterStatusModal(laterStatus.dataset.openLaterStatus); return; } const customerTab = e.target.closest("[data-customer-tab]"); if (customerTab) { const [customerId, tab] = customerTab.dataset.customerTab.split("|"); openCustomerAccount(customerId, tab); return; } const printCustomerBtn = e.target.closest("[data-print-customer]"); if (printCustomerBtn) { printCustomer(printCustomerBtn.dataset.printCustomer); return; } const imageCustomerBtn = e.target.closest("[data-image-customer]"); if (imageCustomerBtn) { imageCustomer(imageCustomerBtn.dataset.imageCustomer); return; } const pdfCustomerBtn = e.target.closest("[data-pdf-customer]"); if (pdfCustomerBtn) { pdfCustomer(pdfCustomerBtn.dataset.pdfCustomer); return; } const excelCustomerBtn = e.target.closest("[data-excel-customer]"); if (excelCustomerBtn) { excelCustomer(excelCustomerBtn.dataset.excelCustomer); return; } const editPurchaseBtn = e.target.closest("[data-edit-purchase]"); if (editPurchaseBtn) { openPurchaseForm(editPurchaseBtn.dataset.editPurchase); return; } const deletePurchaseBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-purchase]"); if (deletePurchaseBtn) { await deletePurchase(deletePurchaseBtn.dataset.deletePurchase); return; } const editSupplierPaymentBtn = e.target.closest("[data-edit-supplier-payment]"); if (editSupplierPaymentBtn) { openSupplierPaymentForm(editSupplierPaymentBtn.dataset.editSupplierPayment); return; } const deleteSupplierPaymentBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-supplier-payment]"); if (deleteSupplierPaymentBtn) { await deleteSupplierPayment(deleteSupplierPaymentBtn.dataset.deleteSupplierPayment); return; } const editExpenseBtn = e.target.closest("[data-edit-expense]"); if (editExpenseBtn) { openExpenseForm(editExpenseBtn.dataset.editExpense); return; } const deleteExpenseBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-expense]"); if (deleteExpenseBtn) { await deleteExpense(deleteExpenseBtn.dataset.deleteExpense); return; } const editAccountBtn = e.target.closest("[data-edit-account]"); if (editAccountBtn) { openPaymentAccountForm(editAccountBtn.dataset.editAccount); return; } const deleteAccountBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-account]"); if (deleteAccountBtn) { await deletePaymentAccount(deleteAccountBtn.dataset.deleteAccount); return; } const editEmployeeBtn = e.target.closest("[data-edit-employee]"); if (editEmployeeBtn) { openEmployeeForm(editEmployeeBtn.dataset.editEmployee); return; } const deleteEmployeeBtn = e.target.closest("[data-delete-employee]"); if (deleteEmployeeBtn) { await deleteEmployee(deleteEmployeeBtn.dataset.deleteEmployee); return; } const quickAction = e.target.closest("[data-quick-action]"); if (quickAction) { handleQuickAction(quickAction.dataset.quickAction); return; } }); document.addEventListener("change", (e) => { const cartUnit = e.target.closest("[data-change-cart-unit]"); if (cartUnit) { const line = state.cart.find(x => x.id === cartUnit.dataset.changeCartUnit); if (line) updateCartLine(line.id, { selectedUnit: cartUnit.value }); return; } }); document.addEventListener("input", (e) => { const cartQty = e.target.closest("[data-change-cart-qty]"); if (cartQty) { const line = state.cart.find(x => x.id === cartQty.dataset.changeCartQty); if (line) updateCartLine(line.id, { qty: cartQty.value }, false); return; } if ( e.target.classList.contains("free-name") || e.target.classList.contains("free-qty") || e.target.classList.contains("free-cost") || e.target.classList.contains("free-price") ) { syncFreeLinesFromDom(); } }); $("modalCloseBtn").onclick = closeModal; $("modalBackdrop").onclick = (e) => { if (e.target.id === "modalBackdrop") closeModal(); }; $("openMenuBtn").onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); $("sidebar").classList.add("open"); }; $("quickAddBtn").onclick = openQuickAddMenu; $("syncNowBtn").onclick = async (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); const shouldShow = !$("syncPopover").classList.contains("show"); updateSyncUi({ visible: shouldShow, title: "المزامنة", status: "فحص العمليات المعلقة...", progress: state.syncing ? state.syncUi.progress : 0 }); if (shouldShow) { await syncNow(true); } }; $("closeSyncPopoverBtn").onclick = () => { updateSyncUi({ visible: false }); }; $("notificationsBtn").onclick = openNotifications; $("addProductBtn").onclick = () => { switchPage("inventory"); openProductForm(); }; $("addPurchaseBtn").onclick = () => { switchPage("purchases"); openPurchaseForm(); }; $("addSupplierPaymentBtn").onclick = () => { switchPage("supplierPayments"); openSupplierPaymentForm(); }; $("addExpenseBtn").onclick = () => { switchPage("expenses"); openExpenseForm(); }; $("addDebtCustomerBtn").onclick = () => { switchPage("debts"); openDebtCustomerForm(); }; $("addPaymentAccountBtn").onclick = openPaymentAccountForm; $("addFreeLineBtn").onclick = () => addFreeLine(); $("completeSaleBtn").onclick = () => openPaymentChoice(false); $("completeFreeInvoiceBtn").onclick = () => openPaymentChoice(true); $("clearCartBtn").onclick = () => { if (!state.cart.length) return; if (!confirm("تفريغ السلة؟")) return; state.cart = []; renderCart(); }; $("goFreeInvoiceBtn").onclick = () => switchPage("freeInvoice"); $("openScannerBtn").onclick = () => openScanner("sale"); $("manualBarcodeBtn").onclick = openManualBarcode; $("cashierSearch").oninput = renderSuggestions; $("homeProductSearch").oninput = renderProductsHome; $("inventorySearch").oninput = renderInventory; $("invoiceSearch").oninput = renderInvoices; $("invoicePeriod").onchange = renderInvoices; $("invoiceStatusFilter").onchange = renderInvoices; $("invoiceCustomDate").onchange = renderInvoices; $("debtsSearch").oninput = renderDebts; $("debtsSort").onchange = renderDebts; $("purchaseTableSearch").oninput = renderPurchases; $("supplierPaymentsSearch").oninput = renderSupplierPayments; $("expensesSearch").oninput = renderExpenses; $("reportsPeriod").onchange = renderReports; $("reportsCustomDate").onchange = renderReports; $("discountType").onchange = renderCart; $("discountValue").oninput = renderCart; $("saveSettingsBtn").onclick = saveSettings; if ($("saveAdminPasswordBtn")) $("saveAdminPasswordBtn").onclick = changeAdminPassword; $("exportBackupBtn").onclick = exportBackup; $("importBackupInput").onchange = (e) => importBackup(e.target.files[0]); $("clearLocalBtn").onclick = clearLocalData; $("printInvoicesBtn").onclick = printCurrentInvoices; $("imageInvoicesBtn").onclick = imageCurrentInvoices; $("pdfInvoicesBtn").onclick = pdfCurrentInvoices; $("excelInvoicesBtn").onclick = excelInvoices; $("printReportsBtn").onclick = printCurrentReports; $("imageReportsBtn").onclick = imageCurrentReports; $("pdfReportsBtn").onclick = pdfCurrentReports; $("excelReportsBtn").onclick = excelReports; $("excelInventoryBtn").onclick = excelInventory; $("excelDebtsBtn").onclick = excelDebts; $("excelPurchasesBtn").onclick = excelPurchases; $("excelSupplierPaymentsBtn").onclick = excelSupplierPayments; $("excelExpensesBtn").onclick = excelExpenses; $("excelLowStockBtn").onclick = excelLowStock; window.addEventListener("online", async () => { await refreshPendingCount(); if (currentUser()) { await runAfterLoginSync("online"); } }); window.addEventListener("offline", () => { refreshPendingCount(); updateSyncUi({ spin: false, status: "لا يوجد اتصال، سيتم الحفظ محليًا" }); }); document.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => { if (e.key === "Escape" && $("floatingScanner").classList.contains("show")) { stopFloatingScanner(); return; } if (e.key === "Escape" && $("modalBackdrop").classList.contains("show")) { closeModal(); return; } if (e.key === "Escape" && $("syncPopover").classList.contains("show")) { updateSyncUi({ visible: false }); } }); document.addEventListener("click", (e) => { const pop = $("syncPopover"); const btn = $("syncNowBtn"); if (!pop || !pop.classList.contains("show")) return; if (pop.contains(e.target)) return; if (btn.contains(e.target)) return; updateSyncUi({ visible: false }); }); } function ensureExcelButtons() { if (!$("excelInvoicesBtn") && $("pdfInvoicesBtn")) { $("pdfInvoicesBtn").insertAdjacentHTML("afterend", ` `); } if (!$("excelReportsBtn") && $("pdfReportsBtn")) { $("pdfReportsBtn").insertAdjacentHTML("afterend", ` `); } const invHead = $("page-inventory")?.querySelector("div[style*='justify-content:space-between']"); if (invHead && !$("excelInventoryBtn")) { invHead.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", ` `); } const debtsHead = $("page-debts")?.querySelector("div[style*='justify-content:space-between']"); if (debtsHead && !$("excelDebtsBtn")) { debtsHead.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", ` `); } const purchasesHead = $("page-purchases")?.querySelector("div[style*='justify-content:space-between']"); if (purchasesHead && !$("excelPurchasesBtn")) { purchasesHead.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", ` `); } const supplierHead = $("page-supplierPayments")?.querySelector("div[style*='justify-content:space-between']"); if (supplierHead && !$("excelSupplierPaymentsBtn")) { supplierHead.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", ` `); } const expensesHead = $("page-expenses")?.querySelector("div[style*='justify-content:space-between']"); if (expensesHead && !$("excelExpensesBtn")) { expensesHead.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", ` `); } const lowStockTitle = $("lowStockTable")?.closest(".card")?.querySelector("h2"); if (lowStockTitle && !$("excelLowStockBtn")) { lowStockTitle.insertAdjacentHTML("afterend", ` `); } } function ensureBootEventTargets() { const containerId = "oskarHiddenSafeEventTargets"; let box = document.getElementById(containerId); if (!box) { box = document.createElement("div"); box.id = containerId; box.style.cssText = "display:none!important;width:0;height:0;overflow:hidden;position:absolute;opacity:0;pointer-events:none"; document.body.appendChild(box); } const make = (id, tag = "button", type = "button") => { if (document.getElementById(id)) return; const el = document.createElement(tag); el.id = id; if (tag === "button") el.type = type; if (tag === "input" && type) el.type = type; box.appendChild(el); }; ["modalCloseBtn","openMenuBtn","quickAddBtn","syncNowBtn","closeSyncPopoverBtn","notificationsBtn","addProductBtn","addPurchaseBtn","addSupplierPaymentBtn","addExpenseBtn","addDebtCustomerBtn","addPaymentAccountBtn","addFreeLineBtn","completeSaleBtn","completeFreeInvoiceBtn","clearCartBtn","goFreeInvoiceBtn","openScannerBtn","manualBarcodeBtn","saveSettingsBtn","saveAdminPasswordBtn","exportBackupBtn","clearLocalBtn","printInvoicesBtn","imageInvoicesBtn","pdfInvoicesBtn","excelInvoicesBtn","printReportsBtn","imageReportsBtn","pdfReportsBtn","excelReportsBtn","excelInventoryBtn","excelDebtsBtn","excelPurchasesBtn","excelSupplierPaymentsBtn","excelExpensesBtn","excelLowStockBtn","topLogoutBtn","logoutBtn"].forEach(id => make(id, "button")); ["cashierSearch","homeProductSearch","inventorySearch","invoiceSearch","invoiceCustomDate","debtsSearch","purchaseTableSearch","supplierPaymentsSearch","expensesSearch","reportsCustomDate","discountValue"].forEach(id => make(id, "input", id.toLowerCase().includes("date") ? "date" : "text")); ["invoicePeriod","invoiceStatusFilter","debtsSort","reportsPeriod","discountType"].forEach(id => make(id, "select")); make("importBackupInput", "input", "file"); if (!document.getElementById("modalBackdrop")) { const el = document.createElement("div"); el.id = "modalBackdrop"; box.appendChild(el); } if (!document.getElementById("sidebar")) { const el = document.createElement("aside"); el.id = "sidebar"; box.appendChild(el); } if (!document.getElementById("floatingScanner")) { const el = document.createElement("div"); el.id = "floatingScanner"; box.appendChild(el); } } async function boot() { await openDB(); ensureAuthLockHtml(); ensureAuthTopButtons(); ensureSettingsAuthBoxes(); ensureExcelButtons(); ensureBootEventTargets(); try { bindEvents(); } catch (bindErr) { console.warn("safe bindEvents recovery", bindErr); ensureBootEventTargets(); bindEvents(); } updateSyncUi({ spin: true, visible: false, title: "تشغيل التطبيق", status: "تحميل بيانات هذا المشروع من التخزين المحلي", progress: 8 }); await loadLocalData(true); if (!state.freeLines.length) { state.freeLines = [{ id: uid("free"), name: "", qty: 1, cost: 0, price: 0 }]; } await tryRestoreAuthSession(); renderAll(); if (currentUser() && navigator.onLine && !OSKAR_TRIAL_LOCAL_ONLY) { await runAfterLoginSync("boot"); } else { updateSyncUi({ spin: false, visible: false, title: currentUser() ? "جاهز" : "بانتظار الدخول", status: currentUser() ? (OSKAR_TRIAL_LOCAL_ONLY ? "النسخة التجريبية أوفلاين فقط بدون مزامنة" : "التطبيق يعمل من التخزين المحلي وسيزامن بعد توفر الاتصال") : "لن يتم تنزيل بيانات Firebase قبل تسجيل الدخول", progress: 0 }); } await refreshPendingCount(); setInterval(async () => { await refreshPendingCount(); if (navigator.onLine && !OSKAR_TRIAL_LOCAL_ONLY && currentUser()) { if (!afterLoginSyncDone) await runAfterLoginSync("interval"); else { await syncNow(false); await validateCurrentEmployeeSession(); } } }, 12000); } if ("serviceWorker" in navigator) { window.addEventListener("load", async () => { try { await navigator.serviceWorker.register("./sw.js", { scope: "./" }); } catch (err) { console.warn("Service Worker registration failed:", err); } }); } Object.assign(window, { state, db, ref, set, get, remove, onValue, off, FIREBASE_ROOT, firebasePath, cleanNumber, money, toast, renderAll, renderActivePage, renderProductsHome, renderInventory, renderSuggestions, renderInvoices, renderDebts, renderPurchases, renderSupplierPayments, renderExpenses, renderCart, addToCart, updateCartLine, calculateCartTotals, getProductByBarcode, getProductById, normalizeProduct, getDefaultSaleUnit, getSaleUnitOptions, getUnitFactor, getUnitText, priceForLine, loadLocalData, refreshPendingCount, updateSyncUi, idbPut, idbGetAll, idbDelete, idbClear, saveLocalBatch, saveLocal, removeLocal, enqueueSync, syncNow, runAfterLoginSync, startRealtimeListeners, rebuildCustomerBalances, logout }); boot().catch((e) => { console.error(e); toast("حدث خطأ أثناء تشغيل التطبيق"); updateSyncUi({ spin: false, visible: true, title: "خطأ", status: String(e?.message || e), progress: 0 }); }); `); doc.close(); await Promise.all(Array.from(doc.images || []).map(img => waitOneImage(img, 130))); setTimeout(() => { try{ frame.contentWindow.focus(); frame.contentWindow.print(); } finally{ setTimeout(() => frame.remove(), 900); } }, 80); }catch(err){ console.error("fast print failed", err); toast("تعذر فتح الطباعة الآن"); }finally{ setTimeout(() => setBusy(btn, false), 300); } } document.addEventListener("click", function(e){ const sync = e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest("#syncNowBtn"); if(sync && trialActive()){ markTrialSyncLock(); e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation(); toast("المزامنة مقفلة في النسخة التجريبية، البيانات محفوظة محليًا فقط"); return; } const btn = e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest("#imageInvoiceBtn,#pdfInvoiceBtn,#printInvoiceBtn"); if(!btn) return; e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation(); if(btn.id === "imageInvoiceBtn") return void downloadExactInvoiceImage(btn); if(btn.id === "pdfInvoiceBtn") return void downloadExactInvoicePdf(btn); if(btn.id === "printInvoiceBtn") return void fastPrintInvoice(btn); }, true); if(document.readyState === "loading") document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", markTrialSyncLock, {once:true}); else markTrialSyncLock(); window.addEventListener("load", markTrialSyncLock, {once:true}); setInterval(markTrialSyncLock, 750); })(); `); doc.close(); setTimeout(() => { try{ frame.contentWindow.focus(); frame.contentWindow.print(); } finally{ setTimeout(()=>frame.remove(), 650); } }, 80); }catch(err){ console.error(err); toast("تعذر فتح الطباعة الآن"); } finally{ setTimeout(()=>setBusy(btn, false), 350); } } document.addEventListener("click", function(e){ const img = e.target.closest && e.target.closest("#thermalImageInvoiceBtn"); const pdf = e.target.closest && e.target.closest("#thermalPdfInvoiceBtn"); const prn = e.target.closest && e.target.closest("#thermalPrintInvoiceBtn"); if(!img && !pdf && !prn) return; e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); e.stopImmediatePropagation(); if(img) return void downloadThermalImage(img); if(pdf) return void downloadThermalPdf(pdf); if(prn) return void printThermal(prn); }, true); })();
